metadata.title: Huy Hoang - Software Engineer
metadata.description: Full-stack developer building scalable web applications with Node.js, NestJS, Next.js, React, .NET and Docker.

footer.copyright: © {year} {name}. Built with Next.js 14, Tailwind, Framer Motion.

chat.welcome: Hi, I'm the embedded AI assistant. Ask me about Huy Hoang's projects, experience, skills, or how to get in touch!
chat.fallbackReply: Chat AI (fallback): Configure GEMINI_API_KEY or OPENAI_API_KEY in .env.local for full answers. Summary: {summary}{questionSuffix}
chat.fallbackSummary: Huy Hoang is a full-stack engineer focused on scalable web applications with Node.js, NestJS, Next.js, React, .NET and Docker. Ask about projects, experience, skills, education or contact.

system.intro: You are an AI assistant embedded in the personal portfolio site for {name}.
system.instructions: Answer concisely, professionally and only about Huy Hoang's background, experience, projects, skills, education and how to get in touch.
system.redirect: If asked unrelated questions, politely redirect to relevant topics.

hero.title:
Software Engineer
& Fullstack Developer
hero.intro: I'm {name} — a software engineer building scalable, high-performance web applications across frontend and backend, focused on clean architecture and modern technologies.

services.title: What I Do
services.subtitle: What I focus on and how I build systems

fullstack.title: Full-stack Web Development
fullstack.description: Building modern web applications with React, Next.js and .NET / Node.js, focusing on performance and clean architecture.

backend.title: Backend & System Design
backend.description: Building scalable APIs and reliable backend systems with PostgreSQL and real-time data.

observability.title: Monitoring & Observability
observability.description: Developing monitoring systems using Prometheus, Grafana and custom dashboards for real-time system insights and alerting.

devops.title: DevOps & Infrastructure
devops.description: Deploying and managing applications with Docker, CI/CD pipelines and cloud-based environments.

projects.title: Projects
projects.subtitle: A selection of things I've built and shipped

aiLogMonitoring.title: AI Log Monitoring System
aiLogMonitoring.description: A real-time log monitoring system with anomaly detection, alerting and visualization dashboard. Designed to process syslog data and provide insights using AI.

networkMonitoring.title: Network Monitoring Platform
networkMonitoring.description: A full-stack monitoring platform for tracking server health, ports, processes and system metrics with real-time alerts and customizable thresholds.

librenmsDashboard.title: LibreNMS Custom Dashboard
librenmsDashboard.description: Customized LibreNMS interface with improved UI/UX, advanced search features and SSO authentication integration.

mqttAlarm.title: MQTT Alarm Processing System
mqttAlarm.description: A system for processing real-time MQTT alarm data, mapping error definitions and storing structured alerts for monitoring applications.

reusableUi.title: Reusable React UI Components
reusableUi.description: A collection of reusable UI components including tree view, tables and dashboards built with modern design systems.

authSystem.title: Authentication System with JWT & Refresh Token
authSystem.description: Secure authentication system with access and refresh tokens, cookie-based storage and automatic token renewal.

metricsDashboard.title: System Metrics Visualization Dashboard
metricsDashboard.description: Interactive dashboard for visualizing CPU, memory, disk and network metrics using modern chart libraries.

selfProject.achievement1: Building a real-time monitoring system with alerting and visualization dashboard
selfProject.achievement2: Designing scalable backend services and API architecture
selfProject.achievement3: Implementing frontend dashboard with modern UI components

upcomingBackend.achievement1: Designing a system for processing real-time data streams and event-driven architecture
upcomingBackend.achievement2: Planning integration with messaging protocols and caching strategies

upcomingFrontend.achievement1: Developing reusable UI components and dashboard interfaces
upcomingFrontend.achievement2: Focusing on performance optimization and user experience improvements

skills.title: Tech Stack
skills.subtitle: Technologies and tools I work with daily

university.detail1: Coursework: Software Architecture, Distributed Systems, Database Systems, Algorithms

contact.description: Open for full-time, contracting or open source collaboration.
